_comment: Demo #4 — scheduled 'living dashboard'. Pass these as arguments to the loom_schedule_workflow MCP tool (requires scheduler.enabled in looms config). Each cron firing re-runs the OpenData snapshot; the run telemetry refreshes in Supabase for Dreambase. agentId is the lab's od-analyst; swap for yours.

stages.promptTemplate: Using OpenData (fred/unemployment-rate), fetch the latest 12 months of US unemployment and report the current rate and whether the last 3 months are rising or falling.
